pages.title: Angie Fashion Show!
pages.description:
Select and style outfits to create stunning looks using the dress-up mechanic in this casual fashion game. Experiment with various clothing pieces and accessories to complete Angie’s runway challenge and impress the virtual audience. Progress unlocks new wardrobe options for more diverse fashion combinations.

Key Features

• Dress-up outfit customization  
• Drag and drop clothing controls  
• Unlockable apparel collections  
• Styling challenge progression  
• Fashion show runway setting

pages.description:
Style characters by mixing and matching outfits and accessories in a colorful fashion wardrobe. Experiment with clothing combinations and hairstyles to create fresh looks for photo shoots and social media posts. • Photo shoot and sharing modes  
• Bright, contemporary fashion themes

pages.title: Angela All Season Fashion
pages.description:
Dress up Angela using diverse outfit combinations and seasonal accessories to match evolving style trends. Players customize looks through outfit layering and color editing across changing outdoor backgrounds. The goal is to perfect her appearance for each season’s fashion demands while experimenting with mix-and-match elements.

Key Features

• Layered outfit customization system  
• Color palette editing controls  
• Seasonal style progression levels  
• Accessory matching challenges  
• Outdoor seasonal background settings
